Exactly one year to the day after executing the MPJ trade to give themselves more depth & flexibility — the Nuggets went cheap, cutting solid backup five Jonas Valanciunas, the only person that depth/flexibility was used to acquire

On another front office failure in Denver >>>

items.title: [Scotto] JUST IN: The Denver Nuggets are waiving center Jonas Valanciunas, league sources told @hoopshype. He had a fully guaranteed $10 million decision today. Denver will now owe Valanciunas $2 million for the 2026-27 season.
items.author: Odd-Direction9452
items.body_excerpt: JUST IN: The Denver Nuggets are waiving center Jonas Valanciunas, league sources told @hoopshype. He had a fully guaranteed $10 million decision today. Denver will now owe Valanciunas $2 million for the 2026-27 season. He’s averaged 12.8 points and 9.0 rebounds in 14 NBA…

items.title: JUST IN: The Denver Nuggets are waiving center Jonas Valanciunas, league sources told HoppsHype. He had a fully guaranteed $10 million decision today. Denver will now owe Valanciunas $2 million for the 2026-27 season. He’s averaged 12.8 points and 9.0 rebounds in 14 NBA seasons.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: JUST IN: The Denver Nuggets are waiving center Jonas Valanciunas, league sources told HoppsHype. He had a fully guaranteed $10 million decision today. Denver will now owe Valanciunas $2 million for the 2026-27 season. He’s averaged 12.8 points and 9.0 rebounds in 14 NBA seasons.
